privacy_policy.title: Your Privacy Matters
privacy_policy.subtitle: How Blooma protects and handles your personal, pregnancy, and wellness information

content.hero_title: Your Data Is Handled With Care
content.hero_subtitle: Pregnancy information is deeply personal, and Blooma treats it with responsibility and confidentiality

intro_blocks.label: OUR PRIVACY PROMISE
intro_blocks.heading: Privacy as a Core Part of Blooma
paragraphs: At Blooma, we understand that pregnancy-related information is deeply personal. The app is designed to support women through structured prenatal exercise, yoga, and walking guidance, and we treat the information connected to that journey with care, confidentiality, and responsibility.

Blooma is designed as a maternal wellness support app. This means privacy is not treated as an extra feature added later, but as a core part of how the product is built and how the experience is delivered to users.

items.title: Designed for Maternal Wellness
items.description: Blooma is built to support prenatal exercise, yoga, and walking guidance with privacy as part of the experience.

items.title: Collected with Purpose
items.description: We collect only the information needed to provide safer and more relevant wellness support.

items.title: Handled with Confidentiality
items.description: Your pregnancy-related information is treated as sensitive and handled with care.

content.hero_subtitle: Your data supports structured and personalized prenatal wellness guidance

intro_blocks.label: INTRODUCTION TO OUR PRIVACY POLICY
intro_blocks.heading: Supporting a Safer and More Personalized Experience
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy explains how Blooma collects, uses, stores, and protects your information when you use the application.

Blooma organizes prenatal activities such as exercise routines, yoga practices, and walking guidance into a structured digital format so women can access safer and more personalized prenatal wellness support.
Because pregnancy wellness data can be sensitive, Blooma is designed to use information carefully and only in ways that support your experience inside the app.

items.title: Clear Data Usage
items.description: This policy explains how Blooma collects, uses, stores, and protects your information.

items.title: Structured Experience
items.description: Your data helps organize exercise, yoga, and walking guidance into a structured prenatal system.

items.title: Sensitive by Nature
items.description: Pregnancy wellness data is handled carefully and only used to support your in-app experience.

content.hero_subtitle: We collect only what helps personalize and improve your experience

intro_blocks.label: WHAT INFORMATION WE MAY COLLECT
intro_blocks.heading: Information That Helps Personalize Prenatal Guidance
paragraphs: We may collect profile information such as your name, email address, login details, and app settings.
We may collect pregnancy-related inputs such as trimester or pregnancy week, selected activity types, exercise preferences, yoga preferences, walking progress, and completed sessions.

Where you choose to provide it, we may also use health-related context or selected restriction indicators to better filter activities and avoid showing suggestions that may be less suitable for your stage or condition.

items.title: Profile Information
items.description: Basic details like name, email, login credentials, and app settings.

items.title: Pregnancy Context
items.description: Inputs like trimester, pregnancy week, and selected activity preferences.

items.title: Activity & Progress
items.description: Your exercise, yoga, walking activity, and completed sessions.

items.title: Health Context
items.description: Optional health inputs may help show safer and more suitable content.

content.hero_subtitle: Your data helps Blooma provide more relevant and personalized guidance

intro_blocks.label: WHY WE COLLECT THIS INFORMATION
intro_blocks.heading: Supporting Safer and More Relevant Recommendations
paragraphs: Blooma uses this information to organize and personalize prenatal wellness support across exercise, yoga, and walking categories.
Your pregnancy stage may be used to support trimester-aware activity planning so recommendations are better aligned with your current phase of pregnancy.
Selected safety and health-related inputs may also help reduce the visibility of activities that may not be appropriate for certain users.

items.title: Personalized Experience
items.description: We use your inputs to tailor exercise, yoga, and walking recommendations.

items.title: Trimester-Aware Planning
items.description: Your pregnancy stage helps align activities with your current phase.

items.title: Safety Filtering
items.description: Health inputs help reduce activities that may not be suitable for you.

content.hero_subtitle: Your data is secured through controlled systems and safe practices

intro_blocks.label: HOW WE SECURE YOUR DATA
intro_blocks.heading: Protection Through Secure Systems
paragraphs: Blooma uses protected systems and controlled access practices designed to reduce unauthorized access to personal information.

Information shared between your device and app services is transferred using protected communication methods, and access to account-related information is protected through authentication and session controls.
Only the systems and functions necessary to support your experience should process the relevant data required for app functionality.

items.title: Protected Storage
items.description: Your data is stored using secure systems with controlled access.

items.title: Secure Transmission
items.description: All data is transferred using protected communication methods.

items.title: Authentication Controls
items.description: Access is protected through login authentication and session control.

items.title: Restricted Access
items.description: Only required systems process your data for app functionality.

content.hero_subtitle: Transparency and control are built into your experience

intro_blocks.label: YOUR CONTROL
intro_blocks.heading: Managing Your Information
paragraphs: You may update your profile information, manage permissions through your device settings, and request removal of your personal data where applicable.
Blooma is intended to respect user control and transparency so that you understand what information is being used and why.

items.title: Manage Your Data
items.description: You can update your profile and preferences anytime.

items.title: Control Permissions
items.description: Permissions can be managed through your device settings.

items.title: Request Deletion
items.description: You can request removal of your personal data where applicable.

content.hero_subtitle: Blooma provides guidance, not diagnosis or treatment

intro_blocks.label: IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER
intro_blocks.heading: Educational Support Only
paragraphs: Blooma provides educational and wellness-support information only. It does not diagnose, treat, or replace the advice of a doctor or other licensed healthcare professional.
Users should consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting or changing prenatal exercise, yoga, or walking routines, especially in cases of pain, complications, or high-risk pregnancy.

items.title: Educational Purpose
items.description: Blooma provides wellness support and informational guidance only.

items.title: Consult Professionals
items.description: Always consult a healthcare provider before starting or changing activities.
